title: calophyllum acutiputamen
intro: Calophyllum acutiputamen is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, commonly known as the Burseraceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum acutiputamen include extracts, oils, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to promote health and well-being.
